hints.title: Hint 1
hints.desc: Try every possible subarray and compute its sum.

hints.title: Hint 2
hints.desc: Can you use a HashMap to optimize?

segments.title: Brute Force Approach
segments.desc: Try every possible subarray and compute its sum. Time Complexity: O(n^2). See code in docs/LongestSubarrayBruteForce.java.

segments.title: HashMap Approach
segments.desc: Use prefix sums and a HashMap to track sums. Time Complexity: O(n). See code in docs/LongestSubarrayHashMap.java.

segments.title: Hint 1
segments.desc: Try every possible subarray and compute its sum.

segments.title: Hint 2
segments.desc: Can you use a HashMap to optimize?
